rationale: Educ. Code §48.152 governs the New Instructional Facility Allotment based on per-student attendance and a $150M cap. It does not reference the homestead exemption amount or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no direct conflict exists.
quote: The amount appropriated for allotments under this section may not exceed $150 million in a school year.
_note: No direct statutory linkage between §48.152 allotment mechanics and the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). Indirect fiscal pressure on the broader school finance system is possible but does not constitute a conflict with this specific provision.
